prompt: A scene of the asteroid in the image hurtling through space, leaving a trail of cosmic dust behind it
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image using image 1 as a visual reference. Depict the large, irregularly shaped, rocky asteroid from image 1, with its textured, grey and blueish-grey surface and prominent craters, hurtling rapidly across the vastness of deep space. The asteroid moves from the lower-left towards the upper-right of the frame, leaving a long, luminous trail of cosmic dust and fine debris stretching behind it against the dark, star-filled backdrop.
objects: Large, irregularly shaped rocky asteroid (from image 1) with textured, grey and blueish-grey surface
Long, luminous trail of cosmic dust and fine debris
Asteroid positioned moving from the lower-left towards the upper-right of the frame
